insight: Gauss Cannon at 7 HP is considered potentially too tanky; masn6811 suggested nerfing it by reducing HP to 6. Separately, Apollo at 2 HP was floated as reasonable since it is almost never correct to breach an Apollo anyway.
author: masn6811
context: Casual balance discussion about HP nerfs to various units, with shadourow agreeing that Apollo at 2 HP would make sense given breach is rarely correct.
